code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn get_or(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or(s, i)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        let v = if neg
          0 - cur
        else
          cur
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    let v = if neg
      0 - cur
    else
      cur
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  end
  nums
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let n = list.len(sorted)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = get_or(sorted, i)
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  let n = list.len(xs)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = get_or(xs, i)
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_line(line)
let sorted = sort_list(nums)

mut out = ""
let total = list.len(sorted)
mut j = 0
while j < total
  let v = get_or(sorted, j)
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
